title: Fig. 7. A in Analyzing the impact of conflictive dental characters on the phylogeny of octodontoid rodents
author: Candela, Adriana M.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 7. A. Strict consensus trees from analysis of Verzi et al. (2014). B. Strict consensus of 27 MPTs of 139 steps resulting from the cladistic analysis of data matrix given in SOM 1. C. Strict consensus of 45 MPTs of 142 steps that resulted from cladistic analysis of data matrix given in SOM 2. D. Strict consensus of 42 MPTs of 146 steps that resulted from cladistic analysis of data matrix given in SOM 3.
